scripts.prisma:generate: pnpm exec dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @dlq-organizer/api exec prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.prisma:db:push: pnpm exec dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @dlq-organizer/api exec prisma db push --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.prisma:migrate: pnpm exec dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @dlq-organizer/api exec prisma migrate dev --schema prisma/schema.prisma
